description: Active watermain replacement on Queen St W disrupts 501 streetcar. Utility crew, road closure, and TTC diversion all filed separately — no coordination. All 4 events within 55 minutes.

events.address: Queen St W & Roncesvalles Ave, Toronto, ON
events.description: Watermain replacement — Toronto Water permit UC-2026-0412. Full road closure required.

events.address: Queen St W & Roncesvalles Ave, Toronto, ON
events.description: Watermain-Possible Break — water flowing from pavement near Roncesvalles

events.address: Queen St W between Roncesvalles Ave and Beaty Ave
events.description: Emergency road closure — watermain replacement in progress. Both lanes closed.

events.address: Queen St W — 501 Streetcar route (Roncesvalles diversion)
events.description: Route 501 Queen: Short-turn at Roncesvalles Ave due to road closure. Buses replacing streetcars west of Roncesvalles.

phases.label: Utility Work Permit Filed
phases.description: Toronto Water files a utility work permit for watermain replacement on Queen St W. No 311 call yet — StreetSense is watching but no prediction triggered.

phases.label: 311 Call — Watermain Break
phases.description: Resident reports watermain break near Roncesvalles. StreetSense fires prediction immediately: expect road closure + 501 streetcar disruption. Proactive dispatch sent to Toronto Water — 55 minutes before TTC knows.

phases.label: Road Closure Posted
phases.description: Transportation Services posts road closure. 3-event cluster forms with utility permit. Road closure confirmed — exactly as StreetSense predicted 20 minutes ago.

phases.label: TTC Alert — Cascade Confirmed
phases.description: TTC confirms 501 short-turn at Roncesvalles. Full cascade confirmed. StreetSense had this covered 55 minutes ago. Operational brief generated, supervisor approval pending.
